# Week 1 Mini-Me Campaign Setup

Generated by: AskDoGood Zeely Mini-Me
Date: 2026-04-27

## 1) Campaign objective

Week 1 goal: safely re-introduce AskDoGood to 1510 clean subscribers, rebuild trust, deliver immediate practical value, then present a holistic support offer that includes Thyroid Health Mastery inside a whole-life framework.

Core promise:
- Real-life support for thyroid health, blood pressure, blood sugar/diabetes support, GERD, IBS, acid reflux, brain fog, stress, and routine rebuilding.
- Mission language: eat to live, never live to eat; build discipline; pay it forward.

## 2) Audience + pain map

Segments:
- Engaged in last 90 days
- Quiet 90+ days
- High-intent clicks/replies this week

Pain clusters:
- Food confusion and symptom flare cycles
- Energy crashes and brain fog affecting daily function
- Stress and inconsistent routine
- Feeling alone, judged, or stuck in restart mode

## 3) Week 1 email sequence (Beehiiv)

### Email 1: Reintro
Subject options:
- RoSee here. We are back with practical support.
- If your body feels off, start here.
- A warm reset from AskDoGood

Body:
Hi [First Name],

It has been a minute, and I wanted to reintroduce AskDoGood the right way.

If you have been dealing with thyroid symptoms, blood pressure stress, blood sugar swings, GERD, IBS, acid reflux, brain fog, or just feeling out of rhythm, you are not broken. You are overloaded, and you need a simple system you can actually follow.

AskDoGood is here for one thing: practical, whole-life support you can use this week.

Our foundation is simple:
- Eat to live, never live to eat
- Build discipline one repeatable step at a time
- Pay it forward as you heal and stabilize

No hype. No shame. No impossible plan.

This week I am sending a short 3-part series:
1) Reconnect and reset
2) A practical daily structure you can use immediately
3) A guided next step if you want deeper support

If you want personalized help, just reply to this email or message askdogood@gmail.com and tell me what is hardest right now.

With you,
RoSee
AskDoGood

Gentle note: AskDoGood education supports healthier routines and is not a diagnosis, cure, or replacement for licensed medical care.

CTA: Reply with RESET and your top symptom trigger this week.

### Email 2: Value
Subject options:
- Your 15-minute daily stability method
- A simple routine for calmer digestion, energy, and focus
- The AskDoGood reset rhythm (copy and use)

Body:
Hi [First Name],

Today is pure value.

When symptoms stack up, complicated plans fail. Start with this 15-minute daily stability method:

Morning (5 minutes)
- Drink water before coffee
- Build your first plate around protein + fiber + color
- Write one discipline promise for today

Midday (5 minutes)
- Check stress level from 1 to 10
- Take a short walk or breathing reset
- Choose your next meal before hunger spikes

Evening (5 minutes)
- Eat lighter and earlier when possible
- Note one trigger that flared symptoms
- Set tomorrow's first meal in advance

This supports the whole picture:
- Thyroid routine consistency
- Blood sugar steadiness
- Blood pressure stress reduction
- Gut comfort for GERD, IBS, and reflux
- Less brain fog through better daily rhythm

If you want, I can send a simple starter template for meals and routine tracking. Reply TEMPLATE or email askdogood@gmail.com.

Keep it simple. Keep it consistent.
RoSee
AskDoGood

Gentle note: This is educational support and does not replace guidance from your licensed clinician.

CTA: Reply TEMPLATE for the starter routine sheet.

### Email 3: Offer
Subject options:
- Ready for structure? Here is your next step.
- If free tips are helping, this is the deeper plan.
- Your guided holistic reset starts here.

Body:
Hi [First Name],

If this week helped you feel more clear, more steady, or more hopeful, this is your next step.

- Community-centered mission: heal forward and pay it forward

If you want help choosing the right starting point, reply START or email askdogood@gmail.com and I will point you to the best fit.

Get the program here:
https://askdogood.gumroad.com/l/thyroid-health-mastery?utm_source=beehiiv&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=week1_offer&utm_content=primary_cta

You do not need perfection.
You need a system you can live with.

RoSee
AskDoGood

Gentle note: AskDoGood programs support lifestyle habits and education. They do not diagnose, treat, cure, or replace licensed medical care.

## 4) Social post set (FB + Nextdoor)

1. AskDoGood is back with a simple mission: eat to live, never live to eat. If you are juggling thyroid stress, blood pressure, blood sugar swings, reflux, IBS, brain fog, and daily overwhelm, we are building practical routines that fit real life. Comment RESET if you want the Week 1 support series.
2. Real healing is not just what is on your plate. It is structure, discipline, and support. This week we are sharing a short reset flow for people rebuilding habits after burnout and symptom cycles. If you want in, drop START or message askdogood@gmail.com.
3. Quick stability method: 5 min morning + 5 min midday + 5 min evening. Small routine moves can improve food consistency, stress response, digestion comfort, and energy focus. Comment TEMPLATE and I will send the starter version.
4. For anyone in restart mode: you are not behind, you are rebuilding. AskDoGood is sharing practical steps for thyroid support, blood sugar balance, blood pressure habits, and gut comfort without extreme plans. Want the checklist? Comment CHECKLIST.
5. If free tips have helped, the guided path is open. Thyroid Health Mastery now sits inside a holistic support framework, so we work the full pattern, not one symptom at a time. Message START for the best-fit pathway.
6. Discipline is self-respect in motion. When we stabilize our health routines, we change families and communities. That is AskDoGood: heal forward and pay it forward. If you want support this week, DM HELP or email askdogood@gmail.com.

## 5) DM scripts

1. Comment follow-up:
Hi [Name], thanks for engaging with AskDoGood. If you want, I can send the Week 1 reset flow we are using for thyroid, blood sugar, blood pressure, gut comfort, and routine rebuilding. Want me to send it here or by email?

2. Value follow-up:
Checking in, [Name]. Which area feels hardest right now: food consistency, digestion comfort, energy/brain fog, or stress routine? I can point you to one simple starting step today.

3. Offer bridge:
Based on what you shared, the best next step may be the guided AskDoGood path. It includes Thyroid Health Mastery inside a broader routine system so you are not stuck managing one symptom at a time. Want the direct link?

4. Gentle close:
No pressure at all, [Name]. If now is not the right time, keep the free plan and reply when ready. If you do want help this week, send START and I will walk you to the best first step.

## 6) Send schedule and segmenting (ET)

Send cadence:
- Day 1 (Tuesday) 10:15 AM: Email 1
- Day 3 (Thursday) 12:10 PM: Email 2
- Day 6 (Sunday) 5:40 PM: Email 3

Segmenting:
- Engaged 90d: send at listed times
- Quiet 90d+: send same content 2 hours later
- High-intent clicks/replies: same-day personal follow-up from askdogood@gmail.com

## 7) KPI thresholds and actions

Deliverability thresholds:
- Bounce < 1.0%
- Spam complaints < 0.1%
- Unsubscribe < 0.6%

Performance targets:
- Email 1 open: 38%+
- Email 2 open: 34%+
- Email 3 open: 30%+
- CTR each send: 2.5%+ (offer email 3.0%+)

Actions:
- Low opens: test subject + resend non-openers after 24h
- Low CTR: move CTA higher and keep one primary link
- High unsub: soften sales tone and increase value ratio
- High clicks low checkout: tighten Gumroad headline and simplify CTA

## 8) Manual execution checklist

1. Confirm Beehiiv segments: Engaged 90d, Quiet 90d+, High-intent
2. Load and schedule the 3 emails with disclaimers
3. Add UTM links to all CTAs
4. Queue 6 social posts across FB and Nextdoor
5. Prepare 4 DM scripts as quick replies
6. Follow up same-day to high-intent replies via askdogood@gmail.com
7. Review KPIs daily and apply optimization rules
